name: Walnut Golf Club - Provo
about: Walnut Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue operating in Provo, Utah. Established in 2021 and now under new ownership, the facility provides a premium golfing experience 24/7/365. Members can schedule tee times at their convenience and play some of the world's most prestigious courses. The venue is equipped with top-of-the-line golf simulators, private bays, and is home to Utah's only public PuttView putting simulator. Memberships grant unlimited access to all locations, with the goal of providing easy access to premium golf year-round. The company emphasizes creating an elevated golfing experience for its members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman and exclusive PuttView technology
Year-round indoor play with private simulator bays
Ability to play prestigious courses from around the world
Improved game metrics as evidenced by member testimonials
Unlimited access to multiple locations with membership
